name: STAG Industrial, Inc.
business: We are a REIT focused on the acquisition, ownership, development, and operation of industrial properties throughout the United States. As of December 31, 2025, we owned 601 buildings in 41 states with approximately 120.0 million rentable square feet. Our platform is designed to identify properties for acquisition that offer attractive returns across CBRE-EA Tier 1 industrial real estate markets, industries, and tenants.

exposures.sentence: the continued growth of e-commerce (as compared to the traditional retail store distribution model) and the concomitant demand by e-commerce industry participants for well-located, functional distribution space

a desire for greater supply chain resilience and redundancy which is driving higher inventory to sales ratios and greater domestic warehouse demand over the long term (i.e. the shortening and fattening of the supply chain)
technological changes, such as reconfiguration of supply chains, autonomous vehicles, drones, robotics, 3D printing, online marketplaces for industrial space, or other developments
